concepts: compression breakout with retained higher-value acceptance
trend-reset expansion after shallow funding-backed pullback

thesis_hint: Explore a new concept this cycle. The latest visible journal entry just consumed an ETH/4h exploit batch, and recent history is still crowded by ETH-family attention plus repeated 1h exploration attempts that keep dying on density. Stay inside the supported universe and rotate away from both. Target TAO 4h and demand 3 materially different but tradeable specs: one failed-breakdown continuation branch that only turns on after downside excess is reclaimed back above value with directional strength improving, one compression breakout-hold branch that requires retained acceptance above reclaimed structure instead of ceremonial confirmation stacking, and one shallow-pullback trend-reset branch that enters when a medium anchor is recovered under still-supportive crowding/funding context. Do not clone ETH tail-harvester or ETH channel logic, do not reuse the zero-trade BABY/SOL intraday grammar, and do not write over-filtered event stacks that cannot reasonably clear the 15-trade floor.
stop_condition: Stop the batch when either (A) one spec reaches walk-forward QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.12, total_trades >= 15, and max_drawdown_pct <= 10.0, or (B) 4 materially different specs are exhausted without a pass. Abort any spec with total_trades < 12, profit_factor < 1.00, or max_drawdown_pct > 12.0.
rotation_reason: Force exploration this cycle: the latest turn already used an ETH/4h exploit batch, recent concentration still leans ETH-family plus 1h work, and TAO/4h is a clean supported rotation that changes both family focus and structural lane without locking back into an already-passing exploit loop.
